                                  ImmutableSet<Sort> sorts,
                                  Taclet t,
                                  TacletConditions conditions,

                           throws IllegalTacletException

        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • sameHierachyBranch

                                   Sort sort2)

      • instantiateGeneric

        private Term instantiateGeneric(Term term,
                                GenericSort generic,
                                Sort instantiation,
                                Taclet t)
                         throws IllegalArgumentException,
                                IllegalTacletException
        Instantiates all variables of a generic sort with logic variables. The logic variable has the same name with the prefix [sort]__
        Parameters:
        term -
        generic - the generic sort that should be instantiated.
        instantiation - the instantiation sort.
        Returns:
        returns the new term with instantiated variables. If term can not be instantiated the method returns null, e.g. this can occur, when term is of type SortDependingFunction and instantiation is of type {PrimitiveSort}.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException
        IllegalTacletException

      • doInstantiation

        private boolean doInstantiation(GenericSort generic,
                                Sort inst,
                                TacletConditions conditions)
        Tests sort of its instantiation ability.
        Returns:
        true if generic can be instantiated with inst, otherwise false

      • instantiateGeneric

        private ImmutableList<Term> instantiateGeneric(Term term,
                                               HashSet<GenericSort> genericSorts,
                                               ImmutableSet<Sort> instSorts,
                                               Taclet t,
                                               TacletConditions conditions,
                                               int maxGeneric)
                                        throws IllegalTacletException
        Instantiates generic variables of the term. It instantiates the variables using all possibilities.
        Parameters:
        term - the term to be instantiated.
        genericSorts - the generic sorts that should be replaced.
        instSorts - the instantiations
        Returns:
        returns a new term, where all generic variables are instantiated. If there is no generic variable the original term is returned.
        Throws:
        IllegalTacletException

      • addListener

        public void addListener(TranslationListener list)

      • removeListener

        public void removeListener(TranslationListener list)
